title: jatropha porrecta
intro: Jatropha porrecta, also known as Spurge or Pencil Tree, is a plant species from the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Jatropha porrecta include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and fungal infections, as well as its use as an insect repellent. Herbal preparations of Jatropha porrecta can be made by infusing its leaves in hot water to create a tea or by applying its sap topically to affected areas.
